# Copilot Instructions

[中文版本](copilot-instructions.zh-CN.md)

## Documentation Language Policy

- For general project Markdown documents, keep an English file and a Chinese companion file with the same base name plus the `.zh-CN.md` suffix.
- Add a reciprocal link near the top of both files so readers can switch between English and Chinese easily.
- When updating one side materially, update the companion document in the same change when practical.
- `PROGRESS.md` remains the exception: it should stay bilingual inside a single file unless the repo intentionally changes that convention.

## Naming Convention

- English: `doc-name.md`
- Chinese: `doc-name.zh-CN.md`

## Scope

- Apply this rule to workspace-level guides, plans, backend notes, and explanatory writeups.
- New documentation should follow this policy by default.
